sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_value DateTime64(3));
SELECT id, date_value FROM test_dates WHERE date_value > parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrZero('2023-01-01T00:00:00.000Z');
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrZero('2023-11-01T12:00:00.000Z') WHERE id = 1;
